description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/mergetb/devops/builder/f36-cib and sets the variable GOPROXY to http://ci.mergetb.net:3000. Define a single stage called build and a job named make that runs in this stage on runners tagged merge and docker. The make job executes the shell commands `ymk tools.yml`, `ymk sled.yml`, `ymk kernel.yml`, and `ymk root.yml` in order, and publishes the build directory as an artifact. No caches, services, or additional rules are required.
